codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature description. CourseMapPage loads all 10 lectures from course-map.json, displays cards with title/topics/exam relevance/difficulty badges, uses responsive grid layout (sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3), and supports light/dark mode. LectureDetailPage component added at /lecture/$lectureId route with proper navigation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill is referenced in AGENTS.md and features.json but does not exist. Worker correctly adapted by using mission-worker-base instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: 'Error: Skill "frontend-worker" not found'. Worker proceeded with mission-worker-base skill.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker copied course-map.json from project root data/processed/ to src/data/processed/ to enable JSON imports. This is a reasonable workaround given the TypeScript configuration.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/data/processed/course-map.json was created as new file. Routes imports from './data/processed/course-map.json'.

summary: course-map-page feature passes review. Implementation correctly loads all 10 lectures from course-map.json with responsive grid layout, light/dark mode support, and click navigation to lecture detail. Lint and build pass. No blocking issues found.
